title: ServerPlus+
description: ServerPlus+ is based on pure performance and great optimization!
body:
![A nice beach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83d2bcff7fd5de7f13e02600a9ddf3755316cdf4.png)

## ❓ What is ServerPlus+ ❓

 ServerPlus+ makes your FPS go higher while playing on servers and highly recommended for low end computers.


<details>
<summary>🛠️ Mods 🛠️</summary>
I will update this list frequently.

Version: 1.0.2

[Advanced HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-hud) by [Razuuu](https://modrinth.com/user/Razuuu)

[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) by [thosea](https://modrinth.com/user/thosea)

[Better Ping Display [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) by [vladmarica](https://modrinth.com/user/vladmarica)

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) by [shedaniel](https://modrinth.com/user/shedaniel)

[C²ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland)

[Enhanced Block Entities (EBE)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) by [FoundationGames](https://modrinth.com/user/FoundationGames)

[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw)

[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50)

[FastChest](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastchest) by [Domi](https://modrinth.com/user/Domi)

[fast-ip-ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping) by [fallen-breath](https://modrinth.com/user/fallen-breath)

[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) by [comp500](https://modrinth.com/user/comp500)

[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot) and [IMS](https://modrinth.com/user/IMS)

[LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu) by [astei](https://modrinth.com/user/astei)


[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3) and [2No2Name](https://modrinth.com/user/2No2Name)



[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by [Prospector](https://modrinth.com/user/Prospector) and [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50)


[Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium) by [Noxcrew](https://modrinth.com/user/Noxcrew) and [Aeltumn](https://modrinth.com/user/Aeltumn)


[Numeral Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/numeral-ping) by [TheKodeToad](https://modrinth.com/user/TheKodeToad)


[Server Pinger Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpingerfixer) by [JustAlittleWolf](https://modrinth.com/user/JustAlittleWolf)


[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3)


[Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) by [Patbox](https://modrinth.com/user/Patbox)


[Very Many Players](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric) by [ishland](https://modrinth.com/user/ishland)


[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) by [isxander](https://modrinth.com/user/isxander)
</details>






If your FPS is 1-150 FPS or/and have high ping, you should give this a try!

I will test a version every day to see if something is wrong!


<details>
<summary>🌟 Features 🌟</summary>

ServerPlus+ features better FPS, better graphics and better ping.

</details>



You can unlock this modpack if you want.

Version 1.04 is recommended for a low end computer.

Thanks for reading!
